QR
placeholder
Scan the QR or visit https://nexusfine.mw/verify/MPAY-2026-04217 to verify this receipt. The verification page will show the same details signed by the Service Provider.
This receipt is issued by NexusFine on behalf of the Malawi Police Service. Settlement is reconciled daily with the Accountant General's office under Clause 14 of the Service Agreement.

Disputes must be lodged within 14 days of issuance at the citizen portal nexusfine.mw/dispute or in person at the issuing station. Helpline: +265 0800 000 NEXUS (63987).
